title: Start a Sales Career with Bank (Entry level) (Perm)/S$4K/Banks/island-wide
description:
Looking to start a career with Banks doing sales? But not sure if you are suitable or is this something that you are looking at?

If you are willing to learn & able to work on weekends/ Retail Branch Hours.YOU are who we are looking for! Call Us Now!

Starting Basic Salary S$3,600 + Sales Allowances + Quarterly Commissions (Monthly Gross income of S$6,000 & above)Degree with/without experience/ Diploma with 1- 2 years working experience

Training will be provided with Good Career Progression

RESPONSIBILITIES:

• Provide financial advice to clients through offering wealth management solutions, such as insurance, structured deposits, loans and unit trusts.
• Play an active part in planning campaigns across the bank or within the branch.
• Develop and strengthen long-term relationships with clientsREQUIREMENTS:• Degree in any discipline with/without experience / Diploma in any discipline with 1- 2 years working experience
• Able to work on a flexible schedule that includes weekends
• Has a passion for banking and wealth management

OTHER INFORMATION:

• Location: Island-wide Branches
• Monthly Basic Salary: S$3,600 Basic + Sales Allowances + Quarterly Commissions – (Monthly Gross income of S$6,000 & above)
• Good performers can expect excellent financial rewards and rapid career advancement.
• Our Company strives to achieve employee satisfaction and provides conducive working environment, recognition, attractive rewards to all staff.

HOW TO APPLY:

So if you are

• An experienced Sales person

• Or someone looking for a Sales Career to earn a better income

• or simply looking for a Change in Career

Kindly send in your resume to louisechia@talentsconnectsg.com

EA Name: Louise Chia Chau Lu
Registration No. R1769464
EA License No. 22C1201

postedCompany.description:
Our recruitment company is dedicated to providing the best possible talent acquisition services for the Banking, Finance, and Information Technology (IT) industries. Our team of experienced recruiters has a deep understanding of these industries and the unique skills and qualifications that top candidates need to succeed in them.


At our company, we believe that a successful match between employer and employee is about more than just finding someone with the right credentials. We take the time to understand the specific needs and culture of each of our clients, so that we can identify candidates who not only have the right skills, but also the right personality, work style, and values to thrive in the company.
postedCompany.name: TALENTS CONNECT
